chunk_text:
List Edit

• Moving an item

From the end of the list, select List Edit . Move the focus to the app to relocate, and press the Select button on
the remote control. Use the left or right button to reposition the app and then press Select. This repositions the
app.

– Alternative, faster way

Alternatively, move the focus to the app to relocate, press and hold the Select button, and then press the
left or right directional button.

• Removing an item

From the end of the list, select List Edit . Position the focus on the app you wish to remove and then press the
Select button on the remote control to display the icon. To delete the app, use the down directional button to
select the icon. This removes the app from the list on the screen.

Alternatively, move the focus to the app to be deleted, press and hold the Select button, and then use the down
directional button to select the icon.

• Sort by Most Used

Automatically sort items by frequency of use. From the end of the list, select List Edit . Position the focus on
Sort by Most Used and then press the Select button on the remote control. The items are automatically sorted.
To save this change, select Done . To cancel, select Undo .

• Adding Apps

From the end of the list, select List Edit . Apps that can be added to the app list appear at the bottom of the list.
Move the focus to the app to be added and then press the Select button on the remote control. Use the left and
right directional buttons to move to the desired position and then press the Select button. The selected app is
added to the app list.

messages.content: You are a customer service agent for Samsung devices.
How do you turn off Voice Guide?
Move the focus from Accessibility Shortcuts to Voice Guide and then press the Select button.

provenance.chunk: The TV narrates the screen events in voice-over. (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
To turn off Voice Guide , move the focus from Accessibility Shortcuts to Voice Guide and then press the Select
button. You can turn on or off Voice Guide . To run Accessibility Shortcuts , see the following:

• Press and hold the (Volume) button on your Samsung Smart Remote or Remote Control.

messages.content: You are a Samsung Tv expert.
How do you view detailed information and a synopsis for a selected program?
Press the Select button on the View Details option to open the details pop-up window, which displays a synopsis. After reading the information, press the Select button again to close the window.

chunk_text:
In the Guide , move to a broadcast scheduled program, and then press the Select button. A pop-up menu listing the
functions below appears.

Use the up and down directional buttons to move within this menu, and then press the Select button to choose an
item. Press to close the menu and go back to the Guide .

For the program you are currently watching, press the Select button.

You can record the program that you are currently watching or a program on another channel.


For more information, refer to "Recording."

You can cancel your scheduled viewings.

You can cancel your scheduled recordings.

You can see the detailed information on the selected program. The information may differ with the broadcast
signal. If the information is not provided with the program, nothing appears.

Press the Select button on the View Details option. This will open the details pop-up window for that program
which will display a synopsis. The details pop-up window contains detailed information and the OK option. After
reading the detailed information, press the Select button on the remote control to close the pop-up window.
